articles.summary: Wojna w Iranie wywróciła do góry nogami szlaki handlowe. Zablokowana jest Cieśnina Ormuz, oddala się pełnoskalowy powrót żeglugi kontenerowej przez Kanał Sueski. Globalne łańcuchy dostaw znowu są zagrożone. Za wszystko zapłacą konsumenci.

articles.title: Blackstone’s Gray: Market ‘noise’ fueled record redemptions from world’s largest private credit fund
articles.summary: Blackstone president Jon Gray defended the quality of loans within the firm's flagship private credit fund.

articles.title: Paramount to combine HBO Max and Paramount+ into one streaming service after WBD merger
articles.summary: Paramount said it plans to merge HBO Max and Paramount+ into one streaming service after completing its WBD acquisition.

articles.title: Versant debut earnings report shows continued pay TV pressure, digital growth
articles.summary: Versant reported its 2025 earnings, giving Wall Street its first detailed look inside the company that started publicly trading in January.

articles.title: First flights take off from Dubai after Iran strikes, but service is 'limited'
articles.summary: Emirates airline said it will resume a limited number of flights as early as Monday evening local time.

articles.title: FanDuel parent Flutter reports disappointing fourth-quarter earnings
articles.summary: Flutter's 2026 revenue guidance of $17.75 billion to $19.05 billion was lower than analysts' projection.

articles.title: State Farm announces $5 billion dividend; $100 average refund coming to car insurance customers
articles.summary: Customers can expect to receive $100 refund on average, though State Farm says it will vary by state and by the amount of premium paid.

articles.title: Lawsuit over $21 million donor-advised fund highlights risks of DAF giving
articles.summary: Wealthy Americans use DAFs to give back and save on taxes, but the popular strategy comes with strings attached.

articles.title: Billionaire family offices invested in pro soccer, bitcoin and semiconductors before the new year
articles.summary: The private investment firms of Leon Cooperman and the Walton family disclosed bold stock buys last quarter.

articles.title: NASA is sending its first Black and first female astronauts to the moon
articles.summary: NASA is sending the first Black and first female astronauts to the moon in an upcoming launch, marking the first journey to the moon in over 50 years.

articles.title: How the 'K-shaped' economy is showing up at two big U.S. gyms
articles.summary: The outlooks of Life Time and Planet Fitness show the divergence in spending between higher- and lower-income consumers.

articles.title: Jamie Dimon says Trump’s $5 billion debanking lawsuit ‘has no merit’ but he’s sympathetic to concerns
articles.summary: The suit against JPMorgan, the world's biggest bank by market cap, and its CEO puts Dimon in an awkward position.

articles.title: Travel stocks fall after thousands of flights grounded following Iran strikes
articles.summary: Airlines and some hotel stocks fell after the U.S.-Israeli attacks on Iran and subsequent retaliation strikes.

articles.title: Versant is about to test Wall Street’s appetite for cable TV in its first earnings report as a public company
articles.summary: Versant, the portfolio of pay TV networks previously owned by Comcast, will release its first earnings report since going public earlier this year.

articles.title: Mortgage rates jump sharply higher after Iran strikes, reversing last week's decline
articles.summary: Mortgage rates moved decidedly higher Monday, as the U.S. war with Iran pushed oil prices up and Treasury yields followed.

articles.title: WBD employees fear coming wave of job losses as Paramount tops Netflix's bid to acquire company
articles.summary: WBD employees fear potential job cuts, culture clashes and high debt loads as Paramount supplants Netflix as the company's acquirer.

articles.title: WBD and Paramount may have an easier time winning regulatory approval than Netflix
articles.summary: With Netflix out of the picture, a Paramount and Warner Bros. Discovery deal may have fewer obstacles to regulatory approval.

articles.title: Netflix ditches deal for Warner Bros. Discovery after Paramount’s offer is deemed superior
articles.summary: Netflix is ditching a deal to buy Warner Bros. Discovery's studio and streaming assets after the WBD board deemed a revised bid by Paramount to be superior.
